claimText: The Standing Deposit Facility (SDF) allows the RBI to absorb liquidity from commercial banks without providing collateral.
evidenceExcerpt: SDF absorbs liquidity from commercial banks without collateral
examUse: Statement-based question on the features of SDF compared to Reverse Repo.
distractorHooks: SDF requires government securities as collateral
SDF injects liquidity into the banking system

claimText: The Standing Deposit Facility (SDF) has replaced the Fixed Rate Reverse Repo as the floor of the Liquidity Adjustment Facility (LAF) corridor.
evidenceExcerpt: replaced the Fixed Rate Reverse Repo as the LAF floor.
examUse: Statement-based question on the structure of the LAF corridor.
distractorHooks: Marginal Standing Facility (MSF) is the floor of the LAF corridor
Fixed Rate Reverse Repo remains the LAF floor

claimText: The Standing Deposit Facility (SDF) is operational every day, including weekends and holidays.
evidenceExcerpt: SDF is available every day, including holidays and weekends.
examUse: Statement-based question on the operational availability of RBI liquidity tools.
distractorHooks: SDF is only available on RBI working days
SDF is restricted to the last reporting Friday of the fortnight

claimText: Interest rates for the Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRRR) are determined by market forces, unlike the fixed Reverse Repo Rate.
evidenceExcerpt: VRRR interest rates are decided by the market, unlike the fixed Reverse Repo Rate.
examUse: Comparison question between VRRR and Fixed Reverse Repo mechanisms.
distractorHooks: VRRR interest rates are fixed by the Monetary Policy Committee
VRRR rates are always pegged exactly to the Repo Rate

claimText: Switch Auctions are utilized to manage public debt maturity by replacing short-term government securities with longer-dated ones via the e-Kuber portal.
evidenceExcerpt: Switch Auctions replace short-term government securities with longer-dated ones to manage debt maturity.
examUse: Concept definition or correct-pair question on RBI debt management tools.
distractorHooks: Switch Auctions replace long-term securities with short-term ones
Switch Auctions are used to swap domestic currency for foreign exchange
